headline: AI进入“按量付费与算力配给”时代--Anthropic和DeepSeek告诉我们的事
abstract: Anthropic最新融资路演数据显示，二季度营收预计冲至109亿美元，单季运营利润有望转正——去年还在说2028年才能盈利。与此同时，DeepSeek将API折扣永久化，把token成本打到底价。两家公司正在把模型层撕裂成两条路：一条把单个token做贵，一条把token总量做大。铲子卖完之后，AI真正的利润战争才刚开始。

headline: co-sign. a very handy mental framework for what kinds of learning transformers do well today, and why it runs into limitations. when @ankit2119 and i wrote about the need for adversarial world models earlier this year, we were describing a couple of the functions of these rungs of thinking that bring us ever closer to the kolmogorov-limit generator of reality. throwing more params, more power, more everything at a demonstrably inefficient paradigm will be outclassed by the simple solution that can hypothesize and seek truth rather than backfit a house of cards - although the bitter lesson is it is simpler to scale and we may hit agi anyway because human intelligence just isn’t that smart nor plentiful
